items.summary: Fix the Market Data LIVE section so that Mid Price, Best Bid, Best Ask, Buy Levels, and Sell Levels display real values instead of dashes or zeros. The issue is that the ICDex quote/order-book fetch is failing silently; add proper error surfacing and a retry/fallback so the UI shows either a live value or a clear error message rather than blank dashes.

In the backend, ensure the query function that retrieves market data (mid price, best bid/ask, order book levels) from the ICDex canister returns a structured error variant when the external call fails rather than returning zero/null silently. Log the failure to the activity log so the operator can diagnose the root cause.
